•   To output the results, press the down arrow key. You can then copy the results and paste them into a Word document.  
•   Alternatively, you can export them as an HTML file or a PDF file.

•   Drawback: Regularized Regression (正则化回归 (Regularized Regression)) in JASP cannot handle categorical variables, such as gender (unless dummy coding is applied).
